problem.title: Blocks World: Sussman anomaly
problem.subtitle: A classic STRIPS planning problem where the goals on(a, b) and on(b, c) interfere.

metadata.teaching_note: Stacks are written from bottom to top. The initial state has a on c, b on the table, and c on the table.
metadata.expected_key_idea: A planner must move a out of the way before placing b on c, then put a on b.
